data.message: What is Flutter?
Flutter is an open-source UI toolkit by Google used to build cross-platform applications.
Explain Flutter state management.
State management in Flutter helps manage how data changes update the UI efficiently.
What is Provider?
Provider is a popular Flutter package used to manage and share application state.
How do you call an API in Flutter?
You can call APIs using the http package and handle responses with async and await.
What is a widget?
Widgets are the basic building blocks of a Flutter UI.
Explain ListView.
ListView is a scrollable widget used to display a list of items efficiently.
What is Navigator?
Navigator is used to manage routing and navigation between screens.
What is async and await?
Async and await allow you to perform asynchronous operations without blocking the UI.
What is a Future?
A Future represents a value that will be available later after an async operation.
Explain Bloc.
Bloc is a state management pattern used to separate business logic from UI.
What is Riverpod?
Riverpod is a modern state management solution that improves upon Provider.
What is hot reload?
Hot reload allows you to instantly see code changes without restarting the app.
What is MaterialApp?
MaterialApp is the root widget that provides Material Design structure in Flutter apps.

chat_posts_data.reply: Flutter is an open-source UI toolkit by Google used to build cross-platform applications.
State management in Flutter helps manage how data changes update the UI efficiently.
Provider is a popular state management package used to share and manage app state efficiently.

chat_posts_data.message: What is a widget in Flutter?
chat_posts_data.reply: Widgets are the basic building blocks of a Flutter UI. Everything you see is a widget.

chat_posts_data.message: How do you call an API in Flutter?
chat_posts_data.reply: You can call APIs in Flutter using packages like http or dio with async and await.
A StatelessWidget is a widget that does not change its state during runtime.
A StatefulWidget is a widget that can change its state dynamically during runtime.
ListView is a scrollable widget used to display a list of items efficiently.
Navigator is used to manage navigation and routing between screens in Flutter apps.

chat_posts_data.message: What is async and await in Dart?
chat_posts_data.reply: Async and await are used to handle asynchronous operations without blocking the UI.

chat_posts_data.message: What is a Future in Dart?
chat_posts_data.reply: A Future represents a value that will be available later after an asynchronous operation completes.
Bloc is a state management pattern used to separate business logic from UI in Flutter apps.
Riverpod is an improved state management solution offering better flexibility and testability.
Hot reload allows you to instantly see code changes in Flutter without restarting the app.
MaterialApp is the root widget that provides Material Design structure and navigation in Flutter.
